title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2928 / 57 OG No. 6, 1009 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 2776, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Project Numbered B-221.25, for the Province of Iloilo, page 464-A, Title B-Highways (Feeder and Secondary Roads), Appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

SEC. 2. Priority Numbered 19, Group I, for the Province of Iloilo, page 42-B, Appendix B of the same Act is amended to read as follows:

"19

Pungtod-Cavite

5,000.00."

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
